final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] counter
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk, negedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if(!reset) begin
        counter <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        counter <= counter + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
